positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene, a stylized silhouette of various whimsical woodland elements like curled roots, abstract fungi clusters, and simplified ferns arranged in a repeating, seamless pattern. The color palette is restricted to deep forest green, muted terracotta orange, and creamy ivory white, emphasizing clean, strong contrasting lines. Focus on high contrast line work and flat graphic design aesthetic, suitable for repeating apparel prints. Central composition, symmetrical balance, vector graphic style, perfect symmetry, negative space utilized effectively, graphic design, crisp detail, high contrast.
